title: Nexus ListCapabilitiesQuery
description: Query parameters for GET /v1/local/orchestration/capabilities (cursor-based pagination + sort, F-F1).

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by the previous response's `pagination.next_cursor`.

sort.description: Comma-separated sort terms. Allowed key: `name` (default). Prefix `-` for descending.
